summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Wine Village landing page after redesign. All major features tested and working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Language toggle works correctly - initial test was selector issue (using text=EN vs data-testid). Using data-testid='lang-toggle-desktop' confirms full EN/PT switching works.
All translations load correctly in both languages.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features fully tested and passing. Hero: dark overlay + left-aligned + italic gold emphasis + 2 pill buttons (LIGAR AGORA / VER PETISCOS in PT, CALL NOW / VIEW MENU in EN) + star rating 4.5/273. Language toggle (PT<->EN) works for all sections: nav, hero, about, menu categories, reviews, location, footer. Menu: 5 pill tabs (Entradas, Pratos Principais, Risotos Especiais, Sobremesas, Bebidas), all switch correctly, DESTAQUE badge on Risotto de Cogumelos and Sangria de Maracujá. Reviews: 4 glassmorphism cards with star ratings. Location: Google Maps iframe background + overlay glass card. Floating contact buttons visible. tel:+351234064340 correct. Facebook links present. Footer download button works. About: oval image + floating circle + 2019 badge. Mobile (390px): sticky header, touch-friendly, proper layout.
features_verified: Hero section: dark overlay, left-aligned, italic gold emphasis, pill buttons, star rating ✓
Language toggle EN/PT: nav, hero, menu categories, footer all translate ✓
DESTAQUE badge on Risotto de Cogumelos ✓
DESTAQUE badge on Sangria de Maracujá (Bebidas) ✓
4 customer reviews with star ratings glassmorphism cards ✓
About: oval image, floating circle, 2019 badge ✓
Mobile responsive: sticky header, proper layout ✓
